creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
ak          2012-06-18 19:25:44 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    converters           Makefile 
  Added files:
    converters/bibtexconv Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  BibTeXConv is a BibTeX file converter which allows one to export
  BibTeX entries to other formats, including customly defined
  text output. Furthermore, it provides the possibility to
  check URLs (including MD5, size and MIME type computations)
  and to verify ISBN and ISSN numbers.
  
  PR:     ports/168627
  Submitted by:   Thomas Dreibholz <dreibh@iem.uni-due.de>
  Approved by:    eadler, itetcu (mentors, implicit)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.207     +1 -0      ports/converters/Makefile
  1.1       +42 -0     ports/converters/bibtexconv/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/converters/bibtexconv/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/converters/bibtexconv/pkg-descr (new)
